2. There is an active relationship (REL) with Blue Quay Markets
3. There is transaction approval from risk_vp (TXA)
4. There is an active bank account (BANK)
5. Policy (POL) states that transaction execution requires active relationship, transaction_type approval, amount limit, and account token

- Active relationship with Blue Quay Markets ✓
- Transaction type approval ✓
- Amount limit check (not explicitly verified in sources, but REQ provides amount)
- Account token ✓

- Transaction type approval: B16-10-SRC-03 shows approved by risk_vp


- Amount limit: B16-10-SRC-01 provides amount=$28,600.00
- Account token: B16-10-SRC-04 shows account_token=ACCT-3910
